input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset crdb-cluster -o yaml 2>&1
input.description: Get StatefulSet spec to see join flags

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"},"name":"crdb-cluster","namespace":"cockroachdb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"serviceName":"crdb-cluster","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-ecx","exec /cockroach/cockroach start \\\n  --insecure \\\n  --advertise-host=$(hostname -f) \\\n  --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \\\n  --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \\\n  --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \\\n  --cache=25% \\\n  --max-sql-memory=25%\n"],"env":[{"name":"COCKROACH_CHANNEL","value":"kubernetes-insecure"}],"image":"cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0","imagePullPolicy":"IfNotPresent","livenessProbe":{"httpGet":{"path":"/health","port":"http"},"initialDelaySeconds":30,"periodSeconds":5},"name":"cockroachdb","ports":[{"containerPort":26257,"name":"grpc"},{"containerPort":8080,"name":"http"}],"readinessProbe":{"failureThreshold":2,"httpGet":{"path":"/health?ready=1","port":"http"},"initialDelaySeconds":10,"periodSeconds":5},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/cockroach/cockroach-data","name":"datadir"}]}],"serviceAccountName":"crdb-cluster-sa","terminationGracePeriodSeconds":60}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"datadir"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-03T13:06:43Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  resourceVersion: "1993250"
  uid: 1fc89eb7-b9d1-43a7-838e-71002d66a32b
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -ecx
        - |
          exec /cockroach/cockroach start \
            --insecure \
            --advertise-host=$(hostname -f) \
            --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \
            --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \
            --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \
            --cache=25% \
            --max-sql-memory=25%
        env:
        - name: COCKROACH_CHANNEL
          value: kubernetes-insecure
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 3
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        name: cockroachdb
        ports:
        - containerPort: 26257
          name: grpc
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 2
          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
          name: datadir
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: crdb-cluster-sa
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: datadir
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending

  readyReplicas: 3
  replicas: 3
  updateRevision: crdb-cluster-69ddbb6d6c

content.thinking:
The logs show that `crdb-cluster-0` has already initialized a new cluster on its own (status: initialized new cluster, nodeID: 1). But the other nodes are waiting to join. The issue might be that nodes 1 and 2 haven't joined yet.

Let me check logs for the other pods and also check the NetworkPolicies.

content.text: The StatefulSet config looks correct with proper join addresses. Let me check logs on the other pods and inspect NetworkPolicies.
